name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Processes Allowed to Access lsass
notes: This Building Block defines processes allowed to access lsass. The process Call Trace from task manager has been excluded by default. Edit this Building Block with any normal behaviour, use the saved search "Process Access to lsass" to search for accesses made in your environment.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Processes Allowed to Access lsass on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' and "Granted Access" IMATCHES '(0x1010)|(0x1410)|(0x143A)' AQL filter query

when the event matches "Process Path" IMATCHES '(C\:\\Windows\\System32\\((svchost)|(taskmgr)|(perfmon))\.exe)|(C\:\\Program\\sFiles\\Windows\\sDefender\\MsMpEng\.exe)|(C\:\\Windows\\system32\\wbem\\wmiprvse\.exe)' AQL filter query

when the event matches "Call Trace" IMATCHES 'C\:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll\.dll\+[\w]{1,}\|C\:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE\.dll\+[\w]{1,}\|((C\:\\program\sfiles\\windows\sdefender\\mprtp\.dll\+)|(C\:\\Windows\\system32\\taskmgr\.exe\+)|(C\:\\Windows\\System32\\wdc\.dll\+)|(C\:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows\sDefender\\Definition\sUpdates\\\{\w{8}\-\w{4}\-\w{4}\-\w{4}\-\w{12}\}\\mpengine.dll\+)|(C\:\\Windows\\system32\\wbem\\cimwin32\.dll\+)).*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Processes Allowed to Access lsass on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
AND when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' and "Granted Access" IMATCHES '(0x1010)|(0x1410)|(0x143A)' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches "Process Path" IMATCHES '(C\:\\Windows\\System32\\((svchost)|(taskmgr)|(perfmon))\.exe)|(C\:\\Program\\sFiles\\Windows\\sDefender\\MsMpEng\.exe)|(C\:\\Windows\\system32\\wbem\\wmiprvse\.exe)' AQL filter query

AND when the event matches "Call Trace" IMATCHES 'C\:\\Windows\\SYSTEM32\\ntdll\.dll\+[\w]{1,}\|C\:\\Windows\\system32\\KERNELBASE\.dll\+[\w]{1,}\|((C\:\\program\sfiles\\windows\sdefender\\mprtp\.dll\+)|(C\:\\Windows\\system32\\taskmgr\.exe\+)|(C\:\\Windows\\System32\\wdc\.dll\+)|(C\:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows\sDefender\\Definition\sUpdates\\\{\w{8}\-\w{4}\-\w{4}\-\w{4}\-\w{12}\}\\mpengine.dll\+)|(C\:\\Windows\\system32\\wbem\\cimwin32\.dll\+)).*' AQL filter query
